testsuite.name: it.unige.portcommand.nlp.NLPPipelineTest
testsuite.system-out: 00:41:25.092 [pool-10-thread-1] [] WARN i.unige.portcommand.nlp.NLPPipeline - pipeline failed to route chat input java.lang.NullPointerException: text at java.base/java.util.Objects.requireNonNull(Objects.java:259) at it.unige.portcommand.nlp.NLPPipeline.processSync(NLPPipeline.java:73) at it.unige.portcommand.nlp.NLPPipeline.lambda$processChatInput$0(NLPPipeline.java:68) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncSupply.run(CompletableFuture.java:1768) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) 00:41:25.130 [pool-13-thread-1] [] WARN i.unige.portcommand.nlp.NLPPipeline - pipeline failed to route chat input it.unige.portcommand.nlp.NlpServiceException: rasa returned HTTP 400: {"error": "bad request"} at it.unige.portcommand.nlp.RasaBridge.attempt(RasaBridge.java:131) at it.unige.portcommand.nlp.RasaBridge.parse(RasaBridge.java:83) at it.unige.portcommand.nlp.NLPPipeline.callRasaWithTimeout(NLPPipeline.java:106) at it.unige.portcommand.nlp.NLPPipeline.processSync(NLPPipeline.java:82) at it.unige.portcommand.nlp.NLPPipeline.lambda$processChatInput$0(NLPPipeline.java:68) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncSupply.run(CompletableFuture.java:1768) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)
